extraction.one_line_summary: VAN DEN BROEK Frank won from 6-rider breakaway after Oliveira's premature leadout failed, with veteran Wirtz positioning perfectly in second wheel
tactical_patterns: Oliveira's forced early leadout from distance exposed him, suggesting domestiques shouldn't lead sprints even in small breakaway groups.
Wirtz (35yo, climber in green jersey) positioned second wheel despite not being specialist sprinter, exploiting draft better than faster riders.

rider_signals.OLIVEIRA Nelson: negative: led out breakaway sprint too early and faded, showing tactical inexperience in small group finishing dynamics
rider_signals.WIRTZ Mads: positive: KOM leader positioned perfectly for non-specialist sprint finish, suggesting underrated tactical awareness in reduced groups
rider_signals.BAKULANS Aleksejs: neutral: 23-year-old held third wheel position but couldn't convert, possibly inexperienced in breakaway sprint timing
